mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rp_workflow_definition WHERE flag = '启用' ORDER BY create_date DESC
SELECT * FROM rp_workflow_definition WHERE flag = '启用' AND status = 'published' ORDER BY create_date DESC
SELECT * FROM rp_workflow_definition WHERE code = #{code} AND flag = '启用' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rp_workflow_definition (id, code, name, description, form_code, definition_json, version, status, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{formCode}, #{definitionJson}, #{version}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateDate}, #{flag})
